heading: Civil penalty
label: 9308 Civil penalty
text: A surety corporation is liable to the United States Government for a civil penalty of at least $500 but not more than $5,000 for violating section 9304, 9305, or 9306 of this title. A civil action under this section may be brought in a judicial district in which a civil action may be brought against the corporation under . A penalty imposed under this section does not affect the validity of a contract made by the surety corporation.section 9307 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)93086:13.The section is substituted for 6:13 for clarity and consistency.
